activated_rules.rule_name: Special LC exception activated, only verify origin

consignor.motivation: LC exception applies (2.2). Consignor verification is NOT_APPLICABLE according to the rules.

consignee.motivation: LC exception applies (2.2). Consignee verification is NOT_APPLICABLE according to the rules.

goods_description.certificate_value: FLAT-ROLLED PRODUCTS OF IRON OR NON-ALLOY STEEL, STEEL SHEETS SECONDARY QUALITY.
goods_description.invoice_value: (1) FLAT-ROLLED PRODUCTS OF IRON OR NON-ALLOY STEEL,OF A WIDTH OF 600MM OR MORE. CLAD, PLATED OR COATED. OTHERWISE PLATED OR COATED WITH ZINC. STEEL SHEETS SECONDARY QUALITY. ...
goods_description.motivation: LC exception applies (2.2). Goods description verification is NOT_APPLICABLE according to the rules.

quantity.invoice_value: Quantities per article, totals listed. Gross weights also given per article and totals.
quantity.motivation: LC exception applies (2.2). Quantity verification is NOT_APPLICABLE according to the rules.

origin.motivation: LC exception active (2.2), only origin is verified. The certificate states Sweden as country of origin (box 3). The invoice explicitly states 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: SWEDEN'. The European Union origin normalization rule (4.5.4.1) is applied. Both match after normalizing case and minor formatting.

manual_review_triggers: LC exception active (2.2) requires escalation to manual review according to rules
overall_assessment.decision_summary: The LC exception was activated due to presence of a Letter of Credit number in the certificate. According to LC rules, only the origin control point is applicable and must be verified. The origin matches between certificate and invoice. All other control points are set to NOT_APPLICABLE. LC exception requires manual handling.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatet hänvisar till ett Letter of Credit (LC) och enligt reglerna får endast ursprungslandet verifieras. Ursprungsländerna stämmer, men verifikationen måste göras manuellt enligt LC-reglerna.
